top_gainers.name: jabrena/cursor-rules-spring-boot
top_gainers.description: Modern Java IDEs, such as Cursor AI, provide ways to customize how the `Agent model` behaves using reusable and scoped instructions. In cursor, the way to do it is named `Cursor rule` and you could see it as a `System prompt` if you use a generic term. This repository provides a collection of Cursor rules designed for Spring-Boot development.

top_gainers.name: austinj-dev/absolute-one-shot-implementation-claude-code-skill
top_gainers.description: How I use this skill: I upload the absolute-one-shot.zip to claude.ai/customize/skills when prompted for files while prompted to "Upload a skill .zip or .md" I then reference the skill in a new conversation- and ask Claude to "Help plan an absolute one-shot implementation for building *", using any previous chats that would be helpful as refs.
